creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
When you make config and remove GSTREAMER pkg-plist isn't correct.
You will fail to build package because library libwx_gtk2u_media-2.8.so doesn't exist.

Attached patch to pkg-plist

P.S.
I didn't test "MS archives support" (I had no need for it), but maybe it also have same problem

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
